title: ECC–QRNG Observer-Coupled Evaluation v1: Preregistered Protocol
author: Farris, Aaron T.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record contains the preregistered experimental protocol for an observer-coupled QRNG evaluation. 
 The protocol defines: - QRNG source (NIST Beacon live API) - HRV-based observer state conditions - session structure and timing - statistical analysis plan - Monte Carlo thresholding - decision rules 
 The protocol was cryptographically locked prior to data collection. 
 SHA-256: 80DC9DF0036CA9CAFD5FEF17E04FCF30C35A2AD50C3722743230340D0F4A125D 
 No modifications to the protocol will be made after this record.
